successStories.title: Success Stories
successStories.subtitle: What our candidates and partners say about us
successStories.story1Quote: VIETconsult didn't just help me find a job, but helped me feel at home in Germany. The support was consistently professional and personal.
successStories.story2Quote: The collaboration with VIETconsult is excellent. The recruited professionals are highly qualified and perfectly prepared. A real added value for our company.
successStories.story3Quote: The entire process was transparent and well organized. From the language school in Vietnam to integration in Germany - VIETconsult was always by my side.

ctaBanner.title: Start Together Now
ctaBanner.description: Let's build a successful partnership together. Contact us for a non-binding initial consultation.

partner.pageSubtitle: Our Strategic Partner for Training and Development

intro.title: talentsCARE - Your Partner for Professional Development
intro.description: talentsCARE is our strategic partner for continuous training and development of your Vietnamese professionals. Together we offer a comprehensive portfolio of training courses and seminars.

collaboration.title: Our Collaboration
collaboration.description: Through our close partnership with talentsCARE, we can not only provide you with qualified professionals, but also ensure their continuous development. This guarantees long-term success and satisfaction on both sides.

cta.title: Learn More About talentsCARE
cta.description: Visit our partner's website for detailed information about the complete range of services.

intro.title: Who We Are
intro.description: VIETconsult is your reliable partner for recruiting and integrating qualified professionals from Vietnam. Since 2015, we connect Vietnamese talents with German companies and create sustainable success stories.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We build bridges between cultures and enable successful careers. Our goal is to connect German companies with highly qualified Vietnamese professionals while ensuring sustainable, long-term integration.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where talents are borderless and everyone has the opportunity to reach their full potential – regardless of origin or location.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: What Drives Us
values.value1Description: We take responsibility for fair and transparent processes
values.value2Description: Highest standards in recruitment and support
values.value3Description: Long-term partnerships instead of short-term solutions
values.value4Description: Honesty and trust in all business relationships

whyVietnam.title: Why Vietnam?
whyVietnam.subtitle: A Country Full of Talents and Potential
whyVietnam.reason2: Strong work ethic and willingness to learn
whyVietnam.reason5: Demographic advantage with young average age
whyVietnam.reason6: Close cooperation between Vietnam and Germany

advantages.pageSubtitle: Why VIETconsult is the right partner for you

intro.title: What Sets Us Apart
intro.description: With VIETconsult, you get more than just recruitment services. We offer you a comprehensive service focused on long-term success.

benefits.title: Our Core Advantages
benefits.subtitle: What you can expect from us
benefits.benefit1Description: We handle the entire recruitment process – from candidate search to integration. You can focus on your core business.
benefits.benefit2Description: Through our own infrastructure in Vietnam and years of experience, we offer you optimal value for money with no hidden costs.
benefits.benefit3Description: All processes comply with German and international standards. We guarantee complete compliance and transparent documentation.
benefits.benefit4Description: Through comprehensive preparation and long-term support, we ensure high employee retention and satisfaction on both sides.
benefits.benefit5Description: Our candidates are specifically prepared for the German labor market in Vietnam – professionally, linguistically, and culturally.
benefits.benefit6Description: A dedicated contact person accompanies you through the entire process and is available even after placement.

promise.title: Our Promise to You
promise.description: We are only satisfied when you are. That's why we continue to support you and your new employees even after successful placement, ensuring sustainable and successful collaboration.

qualitySeal.pageSubtitle: Ethical Recruitment According to International Standards

intro.title: What is the KDA Quality Seal?
intro.description: The KDA Quality Seal stands for fair and ethical recruitment of international professionals. As a certified company, we commit to the highest standards in recruitment and guarantee transparent, legally compliant processes.

standards.title: Our Commitments
standards.subtitle: According to International Standards
standards.standard1Description: Ethical recruitment of health professionals according to WHO guidelines
standards.standard2Description: Compliance with the core labor standards of the International Labour Organization
standards.standard3Description: Respect for human rights in all business processes
standards.standard4Description: No hidden costs, fair contract conditions for all parties involved
standards.standard5Description: Regular review and continuous improvement of our processes
standards.standard6Description: Accessible and transparent system for conflict resolution

compliance.title: Legally Compliant Processes
compliance.description: All our recruitment processes comply with German and international regulations. We guarantee complete compliance and transparently document every step for all parties involved.

complaint.title: Complaint Management
complaint.description: As a KDA-certified company, we have a structured complaint procedure. Candidates and clients can contact us at any time.
